basic_details.organization_name: Acharya N G Ranga Agricultural University
basic_details.short_information: Acharya N G Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Record Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website of ANGRAU. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Record Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per GOI rules in force.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate with Experience in MS Office, Photoshop and sales, Computer Knowledge, Telugu speaking, reading, writing & Typing
qualification.details: Any Graduate with Experience in MS Office, Photoshop and sales. Desirable: Computer Knowledge, Telugu speaking, reading, writing & Typing.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Record Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ANGRAU Record Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Record Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Any Graduate with Experience in MS Office, Photoshop and sales. Desirable: Computer Knowledge, Telugu speaking, reading, writing & Typing.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Record Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per GOI rules in force.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Record Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Record Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Record Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Record Assistant post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Record Assistant post at Acharya N G Ranga Agricultural University is scheduled for 10th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Record Assistant position?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Record Assistant post is any graduate degree. Additionally, candidates should have experience in MS Office, Photoshop, and sales. Computer knowledge and proficiency in Telugu (speaking, reading, writing, and typing) are desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Record Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Record Assistant position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules in force.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Record Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Record Assistant position will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Record Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Record Assistant post at Acharya N G Ranga Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online; they can directly attend the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Acharya N G Ranga Agricultural University, Kadapa, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 516003.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Record Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Record Assistant position is contract-based.
